description: Native English (American), Detroit cadence. Female, mid-30s. Clear, high-quality recording. Persona: community coordinator, teacher. Emotion: warm, steady, dry. A clear, carrying classroom alto that brings a room down without rising; deliberate, plainspoken pacing that gets calmer and simpler under pressure, never louder.
text: [warm] Okay. Slow it down. Say it to me plain... [deliberate] who decides this, and who pays for it? [serious] If it's good for the block, it survives a meeting. And if it can't... that tells us something.
